title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite declined during Tuesday's trading session as semiconductor stocks continued their downward trend. The market movement reflects ongoing volatility in the tech sector. Investors are watching for catalysts that may drive market direction in the next session.
content: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite fell in Tuesday's trading as chip stocks went back to their losing ways.

zh.title: 周三的大股票故事：下一个交易日可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数在周二交易期间下跌，因为半导体股票继续下跌趋势。市场波动反映了科技部门持续的不稳定性。投资者正在关注可能推动下一个交易日市场方向的催化剂。

title: This stock-market strategy has cheap exposure to AI and points to an advantage for closed-end funds
summary: A closed-end fund is offering cost-effective exposure to artificial intelligence investments while delivering strong performance returns. The fund's diversified approach and closed-end structure provide advantages over traditional open-end funds. This highlights alternative investment vehicles for AI-focused portfolios.
content: The fund is diversified and has been an excellent performer, highlighting the advantages of a closed-end structure.

zh.title: 该股市策略为AI提供廉价敞口，揭示闭式基金的优势
zh.summary: 一只闭式基金提供对人工智能投资的成本效益敞口，同时提供强劲的绩效回报。该基金的多元化方法和闭式结构相比传统开放式基金具有优势。这突出了AI聚焦投资组合的替代投资工具。

title: Bill debt soars but many don't know help is available
summary: Most utility bill payers are unaware of available special tariffs for water and broadband services, according to a spending watchdog. Rising bill debt is becoming a growing concern, but assistance programs remain underutilized due to lack of awareness. This gap between available help and consumer knowledge represents a significant consumer protection issue.
content: The majority of billpayers are unaware of special tariffs for water and broadband, the spending watchdog says.

zh.title: 账单债务暴增但许多人不知道有援助可用
zh.summary: 根据支出监督机构，大多数公用事业账单支付者不知道可用的水和宽带服务特殊费率。账单债务上升成为日益关注的问题，但由于缺乏意识，援助计划仍未被充分利用。这种可用帮助和消费者认知之间的差距代表了一个重大的消费者保护问题。

title: Beauty Pie LED mask ad banned over misleading anti-wrinkle claim
summary: An advertising watchdog has banned a Beauty Pie LED mask advertisement that falsely claimed clinical proof of wrinkle reduction in four weeks. The regulatory action highlights concerns about unsubstantiated beauty tech marketing claims. Companies must rely on validated clinical evidence to support anti-aging product claims.
content: The mask is not "clinically proven to reduce wrinkles in four weeks", the advertising watchdog finds.

zh.title: Beauty Pie LED面膜广告因虚假抗皱宣传遭禁
zh.summary: 广告监督机构禁止了Beauty Pie LED面膜广告，该广告虚假宣称四周内能临床证明皱纹减少。这一监管行动突出了对没有证据的美容科技营销宣传的关注。公司必须依靠经过验证的临床证据来支持抗衰老产品的宣传。

title: How to enjoy the World Cup - and keep your boss on side
summary: Football fans and workplace managers are sharing strategies to balance late-night World Cup matches with work responsibilities the following day. The article explores ways to maintain productivity while enjoying the sporting event. This reflects the workplace challenges created by major sporting events scheduled across different time zones.
content: Football fans and bosses share their strategies to balance late night kick offs with work the next day.

zh.title: 如何享受世界杯 - 并与老板保持好关系
zh.summary: 足球迷和职场经理正在分享策略，以平衡深夜世界杯比赛和次日的工作责任。该文章探讨了在享受体育赛事的同时保持工作效率的方法。这反映了由不同时区安排的大型体育赛事造成的职场挑战。

title: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
summary: Prediction betting platform Kalshi is implementing new rules requiring certain users to disclose employment details to combat insider trading. The move follows previous insider trading issues on the platform. These new compliance measures aim to level the playing field and maintain market integrity.
content: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.

zh.title: Kalshi要求用户披露工作细节以解决内幕交易问题
zh.summary: 预测博彩平台Kalshi正在实施新规则，要求某些用户披露就业细节以打击内幕交易。此举是在该平台之前出现内幕交易问题之后采取的。这些新的合规措施旨在公平竞争并维护市场完整性。

title: Jim Cramer says tech stocks are losing the qualities that made them the leaders of the rally
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer argues that technology stocks are losing the fundamental characteristics that drove their leadership since 2023. The commentary suggests a potential shift in market leadership dynamics away from the tech sector. This observation raises questions about where investor capital may rotate next.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said tech stocks are losing key traits that fueled their leadership since 2023.

zh.title: 吉姆·克雷默表示科技股正在失去涨势领导地位的品质
zh.summary: CNBC的吉姆·克雷默辩称，科技股正在失去自2023年以来推动其领导地位的基本特征。该评论暗示市场领导力可能会从科技行业转向。这一观察引发了关于投资资本可能向何处轮换的问题。

title: $70 billion immigration funding package passes in U.S. House in a win for Speaker Johnson
summary: The U.S. House approved a $70 billion immigration enforcement funding package after months of legislative debate. The passage represents a significant legislative victory for Speaker Johnson and the House leadership. The funding will support immigration enforcement priorities and operations.
content: The U.S. House on Tuesday approved a $70 billion immigration enforcement funding package after months of debate.

zh.title: 美国众议院通过70亿美元移民融资方案，众议院议长约翰逊获胜
zh.summary: 美国众议院经过数月立法辩论后批准了70亿美元的移民执法融资方案。该方案的通过代表了众议院议长约翰逊和众议院领导层的重大立法胜利。该融资将支持移民执法优先事项和运营。

title: Super Micro stock tumbles on $7 billion financing plans as company touts AI server orders
summary: Super Micro Computer announced a $7 billion financing initiative while reporting strong AI server order volumes. Despite robust order demand, investor reaction to the capital raise has been negative, driving stock declines. The announcement underscores the tension between growth opportunities and capital needs in AI infrastructure.
content: Super Micro is the latest company tied to the AI boom to announce that it's tapping the capital markets.

zh.title: 超微计算机因7亿美元融资计划股价下跌，同时吹捧AI服务器订单
zh.summary: 超微计算机公司在报告AI服务器订单量强劲的同时宣布了7亿美元融资倡议。尽管订单需求强劲，投资者对资本融资的反应为负，导致股价下跌。该宣告强调了AI基础设施中增长机会与资本需求之间的矛盾。

title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
summary: The Trump family received approximately $500 million from a cryptocurrency deal with Alt5 Sigma, while company investors experienced significant losses. The company's shares have declined 93% from their peak, highlighting crypto venture volatility. This illustrates the divergence between executive compensation and investor outcomes.
content: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.

zh.title: 特朗普家族从加密货币风险投资中获得约5亿美元——但投资者遭受巨大损失
zh.summary: 特朗普家族从与Alt5 Sigma的加密货币交易中获得约5亿美元，而公司投资者经历了重大损失。公司股份从峰值下跌了93%，突出了加密风险投资的波动性。这说明了管理层补偿与投资者成果之间的差异。

title: World's largest chipmaker does not rule out price rises as costs increase
summary: TSMC, the world's largest chipmaker, indicated that price increases are possible as manufacturing costs rise amid the AI boom. The comments touch on geopolitical chip supply chain dynamics and their impact on consumer electronics pricing. TSMC's statements signal potential cost pressures that could ripple through the technology industry.
content: In a rare interview, a senior executive at TSMC discusses the AI boom, the geopolitics of chips and what it means for the price of electronics.

zh.title: 全球最大芯片制造商不排除随成本上升而提价
zh.summary: 全球最大芯片制造商台积电表示，随着人工智能繁荣期间制造成本上升，价格上涨成为可能。这些评论涉及地缘政治芯片供应链动态及其对消费电子产品定价的影响。台积电的声明表明潜在的成本压力可能会波及整个科技产业。

title: Apple’s AI could usher in a historic upgrade cycle that investors are overlooking
summary: Apple's newly announced AI features are expected to drive a significant hardware upgrade cycle faster than anticipated due to increased computational requirements. The monetization potential of Apple's AI capabilities is outpacing investor expectations and could represent a major growth opportunity. This represents a potential paradigm shift in Apple's product upgrade patterns.
content: Apple’s new AI features are on track to be monetized faster than expected, thanks to increased hardware requirements and new “killer apps.”

zh.title: 苹果的人工智能可能引领投资者忽视的历史性升级周期
zh.summary: 苹果新宣布的人工智能功能预计会因计算需求增加而比预期更快地推动重大硬件升级周期。苹果人工智能能力的货币化潜力超过投资者预期，可能代表重大增长机会。这代表苹果产品升级模式的潜在范式转变。

title: AST SpaceMobile’s stock experiences rocky trading as SpaceX plans to launch its satellites into orbit
summary: AST SpaceMobile's stock has seen volatile trading as SpaceX moves forward with plans to launch the company's space-based cellular network satellites. The company is developing broadband connectivity via satellite, positioning itself as a competitor to Elon Musk's Starlink. The satellite-based broadband market is becoming increasingly competitive with major players entering the space.
content: The company is developing a space-based broadband cellular network that could rival Elon Musk’s Starlink.

zh.title: 当SpaceX计划将其卫星发射入轨时，AST SpaceMobile的股票经历波动交易
zh.summary: 随着SpaceX推进发射该公司基于太空的蜂窝网络卫星的计划，AST SpaceMobile的股票经历波动交易。该公司正在开发基于卫星的宽带连接，将自己定位为埃隆·马斯克星链的竞争对手。基于卫星的宽带市场正变得越来越具竞争力，主要参与者正进入该领域。

title: Trump says U.S. must 'respond' after Iran shoots down helicopter over Hormuz Strait
summary: President Trump called for a U.S. response after Iran shot down an American helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz, the latest military escalation in the region. The incident occurred amid ongoing negotiations, with Trump suggesting a diplomatic deal with Tehran could be finalized within days.
content: The latest clash with Iran over the Strait of Hormuz came as President Donald Trump repeated that a deal with Tehran could be reached within days.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国必须在伊朗击落霍尔木兹海峡直升机后做出"回应"
zh.summary: 特朗普要求美国在伊朗击落一架美国直升机后做出回应，这是该地区最新的军事升级。这一事件发生在进行中的谈判背景下，特朗普暗示与德黑兰的外交协议可能在几天内敲定。

title: Anthropic releases Mythos-like AI model to the public two months after private rollout rocked Wall Street
summary: Anthropic has released a powerful AI model to the public following its limited private rollout that had previously unsettled financial markets. The company attributes the broader release to new safety safeguards designed to restrict responses in high-risk areas.
content: Anthropic said the broad release is possible because of new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas.

zh.title: Anthropic在私密推出震动华尔街两个月后向公众发布类似Mythos的AI模型
zh.summary: Anthropic在有限的私密推出引发金融市场不安后，向公众发布了强大的AI模型。该公司将更广泛的发布归因于旨在限制高风险领域回应的新安全保障措施。

title: Micron and other memory makers are driving a ‘supercycle’ for this corner of the chip sector
summary: Memory chip manufacturers like Micron are fueling an unprecedented growth cycle in the semiconductor equipment sector, with suppliers gaining rare insight into future demand. UBS analysts see this visibility as a sign of strong, sustained investment in memory chip production.
content: Chip-equipment companies are getting unprecedented visibility into companies’ supply plans, a UBS analyst says.

zh.title: 美光和其他存储芯片制造商正在推动芯片行业这一领域的"超级周期"
zh.summary: 美光等存储芯片制造商正在推动半导体设备行业前所未有的增长周期，供应商获得了对未来需求的罕见洞察。瑞银分析师将这种透明度视为存储芯片生产投资强劲且持续的信号。

title: Worried about a lower Social Security benefit? How to calculate the exact impact it will have on your retirement.
summary: Social Security benefits could decline by up to 22% by 2032 according to recent projections, potentially affecting millions of retirees' financial security. The article provides guidance on calculating how such cuts would impact individual retirement planning.
content: If benefits go down 22% in 2032 as predicted by the latest Trustees report, you need to know what that means for you.

zh.title: 担心社会保障福利减少？如何计算它对您退休的确切影响
zh.summary: 根据最近的预测，社会保障福利到2032年可能下降高达22%，可能影响数百万退休人员的财务安全。该文章提供了关于计算这些削减如何影响个人退休计划的指导。

title: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, described as a highly capable AI model previously deemed too powerful for public release, has been made available to the public. The model generated significant concern among tech, finance, and government leaders over its potential capabilities.
content: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders

zh.title: 被认为"对公众来说过于强大"的AI工具版本向公众发布
zh.summary: Anthropic的Claude Fable 5被描述为一个高度能干的AI模型，之前被认为对公众发布来说过于强大，现已向公众开放。该模型在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起了对其潜在能力的重大关注。

title: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
summary: The Social Security Administration's latest trustees report projects the retirement trust fund could be depleted by 2032, potentially requiring significant benefit cuts or program changes. The finding underscores the urgency of addressing the nation's largest retirement program's long-term solvency.
content: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.

zh.title: 社会保障退休信托基金可能在2032年耗尽，新的受信责任报告发现
zh.summary: 社会保障管理局最新的受信责任报告预计退休信托基金到2032年可能会耗尽，可能需要重大福利削减或计划变更。该发现强调了解决美国最大退休计划长期偿付能力的紧迫性。

title: Semiconductor shorts pile on as winning trade reverses
summary: Semiconductor stocks, once a favored investment, are now facing heavy short-selling pressure as market sentiment shifts. The reversal marks a significant turn in an investment trend that had previously powered market gains.
content: Investors' favorite trade is suddenly the one they can't stop betting against.

zh.title: 半导体空头涌入，赢利交易反转
zh.summary: 半导体股票曾经是受欢迎的投资，但如今面临市场情绪转变带来的沉重空头压力。这一逆转标志着之前推动市场上升的投资趋势发生了重大转变。

title: We're updating our rating on recently spun FedEx Freight after a strong run-up
summary: The Investing Club is updating its rating on FedEx Freight, the recently spun-off unit, following the stock's recent strong performance. The update provides investors with actionable recommendations heading into the close of trading.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 在强劲上升后，我们更新了最近分拆的FedEx货运部门的评级
zh.summary: 投资俱乐部在FedEx货运公司（最近分拆的业务部门）股票强劲表现后更新了评级。该更新为投资者在交易收盘前提供了可行性建议。

title: Investing in growth stocks isn't like betting on horses. Here's one new trade idea from Todd Gordon
summary: Todd Gordon offers a new investment strategy for growth stocks, distinguishing active management from passive betting by highlighting risk control throughout the investment. The strategy emphasizes portfolio management and positioning over the locked-in nature of wagering.
content: In horse racing, once the thoroughbreds are in the gate, your bet is locked. There's nothing you can do to manage risk from that point forward.

zh.title: 投资成长股不像赛马下注。这是Todd Gordon的一个新交易想法
zh.summary: Todd Gordon为成长股提供了一项新的投资策略，通过强调整个投资过程中的风险控制，将主动管理与被动下注区分开来。该策略强调投资组合管理和仓位配置，而不是下注的锁定特性。

title: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
summary: Kalshi's new "perps" (perpetual prediction contracts) product surpassed $1 billion in trading volume within its first week, becoming the fastest-growing offering in the prediction market platform's history. The rapid adoption signals strong investor interest in the novel trading instrument.
content: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.

zh.title: Kalshi "永续合约"交易在推出一周内交易量突破10亿美元
zh.summary: Kalshi新推出的"永续合约"产品在首周交易量就突破了10亿美元，成为该预测市场平台历史上增长最快的产品。快速采用表明投资者对这种新型交易工具产生了浓厚的兴趣。

title: White House border czar Tom Homan blames New York Gov. Hochul for promised ICE surge
summary: White House border czar Tom Homan blamed New York Governor Kathy Hochul for limiting ICE operations after she signed legislation blocking cooperating agreements with immigration enforcement. The dispute highlights tensions between federal immigration enforcement and state-level protections.
content: Gov. Kathy Hohul in May signed a New York law that barred agreements with ICE that made it easier for the agency to detain immigrants who had been jailed.

zh.title: 白宫边境官员汤姆·霍曼指责纽约州长霍楚尔阻止承诺的移民执法行动增加
zh.summary: 白宫边境官员汤姆·霍曼指责纽约州长卡西·霍楚尔在签署限制与移民执法部门合作协议的立法后限制了ICE行动。这场争端凸显了联邦移民执法与州级保护之间的紧张关系。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Apple, Micron Technology, Coherent, DraftKings, J.M. Smucker & more
summary: Major tech and consumer stocks including Apple, Micron Technology, DraftKings, and J.M. Smucker are experiencing significant price movements during midday trading. The article tracks which companies are capturing investor attention and driving market volatility.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 午间股票大幅波动：苹果、美光科技、Coherent、DraftKings、J.M.斯玛克等公司
zh.summary: 包括苹果、美光科技、DraftKings和J.M.斯玛克在内的主要科技和消费类股票在午间交易中经历了显著的价格波动。该文章追踪了哪些公司正在吸引投资者的注意力并驱动市场波动。

title: As LIV Golf faces a Saudi funding cliff, CEO says to take PIF 'at their word'
summary: LIV Golf's CEO acknowledged the funding cliff ahead as Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund plans to end financial support after the 2026 season. The uncertainty raises questions about whether the controversial golf league can survive without the massive Saudi backing that launched it.
content: PIF is set to stop funding the golf league after the 2026 season, though O'Neil could not guarantee that the final four tournaments will take place.

zh.title: 当LIV Golf面临沙特资金悬崖时，首席执行官表示要相信PIF的言辞
zh.summary: LIV Golf首席执行官承认了即将到来的资金悬崖，因为沙特阿拉伯公共投资基金计划在2026年赛季后停止财务支持。这种不确定性引发了关于这个争议性高尔夫联赛在没有推动其成立的巨大沙特资金支持下是否能存活的问题。

title: SpaceX IPO explained: The price is set, but retail allocation still up in the air
summary: SpaceX's initial public offering pricing has been set, though the availability of shares for retail investors remains uncertain as major brokerages including Fidelity, Charles Schwab, and Robinhood work out allocation details. The IPO represents one of the most anticipated offerings from Elon Musk's company.
content: Charles Schwab, Fidelity, Robinhood, SoFi and Morgan Stanley's E-Trade are among the brokerage platforms making SpaceX shares available.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO详解：价格已确定，但零售分配仍悬而未决
zh.summary: SpaceX首次公开募股的价格已经确定，但零售投资者获得股份的可用性仍存在不确定性，因为包括富达、嘉信理财和Robinhood在内的主要经纪公司正在制定分配细节。这个IPO代表了埃隆·马斯克公司最令人期待的募股之一。

title: There's still plenty of runway on the tech boom, analysts say
summary: Market analysts believe the technology sector still has significant growth potential ahead, supported by favorable credit conditions and robust corporate profits. Strong fundamentals suggest the current tech boom has not yet reached its peak despite recent strong gains.
content: Low credit spreads and strong profits are among the factors that have been holding off a peak.

zh.title: 分析师表示科技繁荣仍有充足的发展空间
zh.summary: 市场分析师认为科技行业前方仍有重大增长潜力，得到有利信贷条件和强劲企业利润的支持。强劲的基本面表明，尽管近期涨幅强劲，但当前科技繁荣尚未达到顶峰。

title: Washington is quietly changing the rules for America’s railroads, and the timing couldn’t be worse
summary: Congress and the White House are implementing regulatory changes to railroads at a time when industry stability is critical. These policy shifts risk disrupting a key economic sector that relies on efficient rail transport for goods movement.
content: Congress and the White House are moving to micromanage railroads — putting a vital artery of the U.S. economy at risk.

zh.title: 华盛顿悄悄改变美国铁路规则，时机再糟糕不过
zh.summary: 国会和白宫在行业稳定至关重要的时刻实施铁路监管变化。这些政策转变可能会扰乱依赖高效铁路运输货物的关键经济部门。

title: Final piece of 'iconic' Denby Pottery signed
summary: Denby Pottery, a historic pottery firm established in 1809, has appointed administrators following financial difficulties driven by rising energy and labor costs. The move signals the end of the company's long operational history amid challenging economic conditions.
content: The firm, founded in 1809, appointed administrators due to rising energy and labour costs.

zh.title: 标志性丹比陶瓷的最后一件作品已签署
zh.summary: 成立于1809年的历史陶瓷公司丹比陶瓷因能源和劳动力成本上升导致的财务困难而任命了管理员。这一举措标志着该公司在经济困难时期漫长运营历史的终结。

title: Oil prices fall as Trump tries to convince market an Iran deal is close despite recent violence
summary: Oil prices declined as President Trump claimed progress toward an Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, though no formal agreement has been reached despite recent military tensions. Market movements reflect investor skepticism about the deal's likelihood.
content: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said a deal with Tehran to reopen Hormuz is close, but such an agreement still has not materialized.

zh.title: 随着特朗普试图说服市场伊朗协议即将达成，油价下跌，尽管近期暴力事件频繁
zh.summary: 特朗普总统声称在伊朗协议方面取得进展以重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，但尽管近期出现军事紧张局势，尚未达成正式协议。市场波动反映了投资者对协议可能性的怀疑。

title: U.S. stock futures rise as oil slides, chip stocks continue rebound: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock futures rose Monday as falling oil prices and a recovery in semiconductor stocks lifted major indices including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite. The tech sector strength signaled continued momentum in market recovery.
content: A rally in chip stocks boosted the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite on Monday.

zh.title: 美国股指期货上涨，油价下滑，芯片股继续反弹：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国股指期货周一上涨，油价下跌和半导体股回升带动标普500指数和纳斯达克综合指数等主要指数上升。科技板块的强劲表现预示着市场复苏的持续动力。

title: SpaceX employee group creates low-fee wealth management option with Choreo for post-IPO
summary: SpaceX employees have partnered with Choreo to establish a low-cost wealth management service, representing an innovative approach that could redistribute power in the wealth advisory industry. This model allows investor groups to bypass traditional advisory firms.
content: The deal marks a bold experiment in the wealth management industry that could shift the balance of power from advisory firms to wealthy groups of investors.

zh.title: SpaceX员工集团与Choreo合作创建低费用财富管理服务
zh.summary: SpaceX员工与Choreo合作建立低成本财富管理服务，代表了一种创新方式，可能改变财富咨询行业的权力格局。这一模式允许投资者团体绕过传统咨询公司。

title: Upstart chipmakers keep challenging Nvidia. This time it's Microsoft-backed D-Matrix
summary: Microsoft-backed D-Matrix is entering full production of an AI chip that claims to be 10 times faster than traditional GPUs while addressing memory bottlenecks. The development represents continued competitive pressure on Nvidia's market dominance in AI hardware.
content: Nvidia challenger D-Matrix is entering full production of an AI chip it says is 10 times faster than a GPU and bypasses the memory shortage.

zh.title: 新兴芯片制造商继续挑战英伟达，这次是微软支持的D-Matrix
zh.summary: 微软支持的D-Matrix正在全面生产一款声称比传统GPU快10倍的人工智能芯片，同时解决内存瓶颈问题。这一发展代表了对英伟达人工智能硬件市场主导地位的持续竞争压力。

title: Rivian is betting on its R2 EV to turn the automaker into a household name like Tesla
summary: Rivian is positioning its R2 electric SUV as the vehicle to transition the company from a luxury EV niche player to a mainstream automaker competing with Tesla. The model's success is critical to Rivian's broader market expansion strategy.
content: The R2 SUV is meant to transform Rivian from a niche EV manufacturer that sells luxury vehicles into a more mainstream brand like U.S. EV leader Tesla.

zh.title: 里维安赌注在其R2电动车上，希望成为像特斯拉那样的家喻户晓品牌
zh.summary: 里维安正在定位其R2电动SUV为该公司从豪华电动汽车利基参与者过渡到与特斯拉竞争的主流汽车制造商的关键车型。该车型的成功对里维安更广泛的市场扩张战略至关重要。

title: Inflation data threatens to derail market comeback. How the S&P 500 may react
summary: Upcoming May inflation data could undermine recent market gains as investors assess the duration of price increases stemming from the U.S.-Iran conflict. Core inflation readings will be closely monitored for signals about future Federal Reserve policy.
content: Investors will be watching core inflation in May closely to see just how long higher prices from the U.S.-Iran war may last, according to JPMorgan.

zh.title: 通胀数据威胁市场反弹。标普500指数可能如何反应
zh.summary: 即将发布的5月通胀数据可能会破坏最近的市场涨幅，因为投资者评估源自美国-伊朗冲突的价格上涨的持续时间。核心通胀数据将受到密切关注，以寻找有关未来美联储政策的信号。

title: The 'SaaSpocalypse' is over, says private equity giant Thoma Bravo. Here's why it sees an AI boom for software
summary: Private equity firm Thoma Bravo believes the software industry downturn has ended and predicts an AI-driven growth period for software companies. The optimistic outlook reflects confidence that artificial intelligence will create significant value for the sector.
content: Thoma Bravo founder Orlando Bravo says AI offers an "enormous tailwind" for software companies.

zh.title: 私募巨头Thoma Bravo表示"SaaS末日"已结束。以下是它为何看好软件领域的AI繁荣
zh.summary: 私募股权公司Thoma Bravo认为软件行业的低迷已经结束，并预测软件公司将迎来由人工智能驱动的增长期。这种乐观的前景反映了人们对人工智能将为该行业创造巨大价值的信心。

title: 51% of U.S. adults say the American Dream is out of reach for most people right now: CNBC survey
summary: A CNBC survey found that 51% of American adults believe the American Dream is unattainable for most people, with 81% citing rising cost of living as the primary barrier. The data reflects widespread economic anxiety about financial opportunity and affordability.
content: In an exclusive CNBC survey, 81% of respondents said the cost of living is their biggest financial hurdle to achieving the American Dream.

zh.title: 51% 的美国成年人表示美国梦现在对大多数人来说遥不可及：CNBC 调查
zh.summary: CNBC 调查发现，51% 的美国成年人认为美国梦对大多数人来说是无法实现的，其中 81% 的人将生活成本上升列为主要障碍。这些数据反映了人们对财务机会和承受能力的广泛经济焦虑。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: GSK, Nuvalent, J.M. Smucker, SailPoint and more
summary: Several stocks including GSK, Nuvalent, J.M. Smucker, and SailPoint experienced significant price movements during premarket trading. The activity reflects early investor sentiment on various corporate developments and market conditions.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.

zh.title: 盘前波动最大的股票：葛兰素史克、Nuvalent、J.M. 斯马克和 SailPoint 等
zh.summary: 包括葛兰素史克、Nuvalent、J.M. 斯马克和 SailPoint 在内的多只股票在盘前交易中经历了显著的价格波动。这种活动反映了投资者对各种公司发展和市场状况的早期情绪。

title: Fund a grandchild’s retirement tax-free from birth — if you can trust an 18-year-old with the money
summary: A new financial product allows grandparents to fund a grandchild's retirement account tax-free from birth, but transfers full control to the beneficiary at age 18. The innovative savings tool trades long-term tax advantages for early recipient control.
content: A new birth-to-retirement account bypasses standard Roth IRA rules — but the beneficiary gets control at adulthood.

zh.title: 为孙子从出生起建立免税退休基金——如果你能相信一个 18 岁的人能妥善管理这笔钱
zh.summary: 一种新的金融产品允许祖父母从孙子出生起就为其退休账户进行免税供款，但在受益人年满 18 岁时将完全控制权转移给受益人。这个创新的储蓄工具以早期受益人的控制权换取长期的税收优惠。

title: Markets are pricing in a rate hike by the European Central Bank — which one top economist sees as a ‘mistake in the making’
summary: Market expectations suggest the European Central Bank will raise interest rates for the first time in nearly three years, though some economists argue the move would be ill-timed. The rate decision will have significant implications for European economic growth and inflation.
content: The decision to raise interest rates would mark the central bank’s first in almost three years.

zh.title: 市场预期欧洲央行将提高利率——一位顶级经济学家认为这是"正在形成的错误"
zh.summary: 市场预期显示欧洲央行将近三年来首次提高利率，尽管一些经济学家认为这一举措时机不当。该利率决定将对欧洲经济增长和通胀产生重大影响。

title: I’ve been invited to two weddings in India. How much will this end up costing me?
summary: This personal finance article examines the unexpected costs associated with attending multiple weddings in India as a first-time adult guest. The piece provides guidance on budgeting for international wedding expenses and cultural considerations.
content: ‘This is my first time going to a wedding as an adult’

zh.title: 我被邀请参加印度的两场婚礼。这最终会花费我多少钱?
zh.summary: 这篇个人理财文章研究了作为首次参加成人婚礼的宾客在印度参加多场婚礼的意外成本。该文章提供了国际婚礼费用预算和文化考虑的指导。

title: Low income? You can still borrow for college. Here’s where to start
summary: A guide outlining borrowing options available to low-income students to help bridge the gap between college costs and their financial capacity. The resource identifies alternative funding sources to help make higher education more accessible.
content: Low income? You can still borrow for college. We found ways to help bridge the gap between what college costs and what you can afford.

zh.title: 低收入？你仍然可以为大学贷款。从这里开始
zh.summary: 一份指南，列出了低收入学生可用的借款选项，以帮助弥补大学费用和他们经济能力之间的差距。该资源确定了替代资金来源，以帮助使高等教育更容易获得。

title: US adds BYD to list of firms with alleged Chinese military ties
summary: The US Pentagon has added BYD to its list of Chinese companies with alleged military ties, warning American firms about risks of engaging with these entities. This reflects growing US scrutiny of Chinese companies in military-adjacent sectors.
content: The Pentagon list warns US firms of risks linked to working with flagged Chinese companies.

zh.title: 美国将比亚迪列入涉嫌与中国军事有关的企业名单
zh.summary: 美国五角大楼已将比亚迪列入与军事有关的中国企业名单，警告美国企业与这些实体互动的风险。这反映了美国对军事相关领域中国企业日益增加的审视。

title: China's May shipments to U.S. clock 5-year high growth at 35% as overall exports jump on tech boost
summary: China's exports to the US grew 35% in May, the fastest rate in five years, driven by technology sector strength. This marks a significant rebound from prolonged declines and the strongest performance since March 2021.
content: Exports to the U.S. surged the most since March 2021, extending a rebound following a long streak of double-digit declines for the most of last year.

zh.title: 中国5月对美出口增长35%创五年新高，科技行业推动出口大幅增长
zh.summary: 中国5月对美出口增长35%，为五年来最快速度，由科技行业强劲表现推动。这标志着从长期下降的显著反弹，也是自2021年3月以来最强表现。

title: Gabriel Raimondo, 18, wins deputy seat in election
summary: An 18-year-old Gabriel Raimondo won a deputy seat in Jersey elections, becoming the island's youngest politician. He ran a campaign focused on addressing cost-of-living concerns.
content: He becomes Jersey's youngest ever politician after campaigning heavily on the cost of living.

zh.title: 18岁的加布里埃尔·雷蒙多赢得代理席位选举
zh.summary: 18岁的加布里埃尔·雷蒙多在泽西岛选举中赢得代理席位，成为该岛最年轻的政治家。他的竞选活动重点关注解决生活成本问题。

title: Iraq and UAE race to establish alternative oil pipelines as exports through Hormuz dry up
summary: Iraq and the UAE are developing alternative oil pipeline routes as traditional Hormuz Strait exports face constraints. Iraq's cabinet approved acceleration of crude exports via the Kurdistan-Turkey pipeline network.
content: Last week, the Iraqi cabinet approved plans to accelerate crude exports through the Kurdistan-Turkey pipeline network.

zh.title: 伊拉克和阿联酋争相建立替代石油管道，因为经霍尔木兹海峡的出口枯竭
zh.summary: 伊拉克和阿联酋正在开发替代石油管道路线，因为传统霍尔木兹海峡出口面临制约。伊拉克内阁批准加快通过库尔德斯坦-土耳其管道网络的原油出口。

title: BlackRock says 'mega forces' are changing investing. Here's what they say to do
summary: BlackRock identifies AI and other "mega forces" as fundamentally transforming investment strategies, suggesting investors reconsider traditional portfolio management principles. The asset manager offers guidance on adapting to these shifts.
content: Investors may need to rethink the most basic principles of portfolio management as AI changes the rules, according to BlackRock.

zh.title: 贝莱德表示"巨大力量"正在改变投资。以下是他们的建议
zh.summary: 贝莱德认为人工智能和其他"巨大力量"正在从根本上改变投资策略，建议投资者重新考虑传统的投资组合管理原则。这家资产管理公司提供了适应这些变化的指导意见。

title: He left Goldman Sachs after 26 years with no job lined up. Now he runs one of America’s oldest banks
summary: Robin Vince left Goldman Sachs after 26 years without securing another position, eventually becoming CEO of BNY Mellon, one of America's oldest banks. His career pivot reflects lessons from the financial crisis and demonstrates the value of stepping back from a successful path.
content: After 26 years at Goldman Sachs, Robin Vince walked away without another job lined up. In this episode of "Executive Decisions," the BNY CEO reflects on why he stepped off a successful career path, what he learned during the global financial crisis and how that pause ultimately led him to one of America’s oldest banks.

zh.title: 他在高盛工作26年后离职，没有找到新工作。现在他管理着美国最古老的银行之一
zh.summary: 罗宾·文斯在高盛工作26年后离职，没有获得其他职位就离开，最终成为美国最古老的银行之一纽约梅隆银行的首席执行官。他的职业转变反映了金融危机的教训，展示了从成功之路上退后一步的价值。

title: Oil prices may hit $150 per barrel soon if Iran war continues, energy economist says
summary: An energy economist warns oil prices could spike to $150 per barrel if conflict with Iran escalates. The assessment highlights geopolitical risks to global energy supplies.

zh.title: 如果伊朗战争继续，石油价格可能很快升至每桶150美元，能源经济学家表示
zh.summary: 一位能源经济学家警告称，如果与伊朗的冲突升级，石油价格可能飙升至每桶150美元。该评估凸显了地缘政治风险对全球能源供应的影响。

title: Asia chip-linked shares recover after U.S. peers bounce back
summary: Asian semiconductor-related stocks rebounded following gains in US chip equities, as the S&P 500 rose 0.3% and the Nasdaq jumped 0.86%. The recovery reflects renewed investor confidence in the technology sector.
content: In the U.S., chip stocks powered gains on Monday, helping the S&P 500 gain 0.3%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite advanced 0.86%.

zh.title: 美国芯片股反弹后，亚洲芯片相关股票回升
zh.summary: 在美国芯片股上涨后，亚洲半导体相关股票反弹，标普500指数上涨0.3%，纳斯达克指数上涨0.86%。这种反弹反映了投资者对科技行业的重新看好。

title: Trump booed at Madison Square Garden before Knicks, Spurs finals game
summary: Former President Trump was booed at Madison Square Garden before the Knicks-Spurs NBA finals game, reflecting ongoing political polarization. The incident highlights public sentiment divisions during major sporting events.

zh.title: 特朗普在麦迪逊广场花园被嘘声，尼克斯对阵马刺总决赛前
zh.summary: 前总统特朗普在麦迪逊广场花园被嘘声，这发生在尼克斯对阵马刺NBA总决赛比赛前，反映了持续的政治两极分化。这一事件突出了重大体育赛事期间公众情绪的分裂。

title: Pentagon expands list of China military-linked firms to include Alibaba, Baidu in fresh blow to diplomatic thaw
summary: The Pentagon added Chinese tech giants Alibaba and Baidu to its list of military-linked companies, escalating U.S.-China tensions. The move contradicts recent diplomatic efforts, as the Pentagon had previously posted and withdrawn a similar list before Trump's China trip.
content: The Pentagon briefly posted a similar expanded list in February, then withdrew it without explanation before Trump's China trip.

zh.title: 五角大楼扩大中国军方关联企业名单，将阿里巴巴、百度纳入其中，对外交缓和造成新打击
zh.summary: 五角大楼将中国科技巨头阿里巴巴和百度列入其军方关联公司名单，加剧了美中紧张关系。这一举措与最近的外交努力相悖，因为五角大楼在特朗普访华前曾发布并撤回过类似名单。

title: Perplexity plans IPO in 2028 regardless of what happens to Anthropic or OpenAI, CEO tells CNBC
summary: Perplexity's CEO announced the AI startup plans to go public in 2028, independent of competitor developments. The declaration comes as rivals Anthropic and OpenAI have both filed for IPOs, intensifying competition in the AI sector.
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas' comments come after AI giant Anthropic confidentially filed to go public.

zh.title: Perplexity计划2028年IPO，无论Anthropic或OpenAI发生什么，CEO告诉CNBC
zh.summary: Perplexity首席执行官宣布这家AI初创公司计划在2028年上市，独立于竞争对手的发展。这一声明是在竞争对手Anthropic和OpenAI都已申请IPO之际发表的，加剧了AI领域的竞争。

title: Progressive Nithya Raman advances to November runoff against Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass
summary: Progressive city council member Nithya Raman advanced to a November runoff against incumbent Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass. The matchup sets up a contest between two Democrats and former allies to lead the nation's second-largest city.
content: Progressive city council member Nithya Raman has advanced to a November runoff against Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass, setting up an unexpected matchup between two Democrats and former political allies to run the struggling city of nearly 4 million.

zh.title: 进步派尼亚雅·拉曼在洛杉矶市长卡伦·巴斯的11月竞选中晋级
zh.summary: 进步派城市议员尼亚雅·拉曼在与现任洛杉矶市长卡伦·巴斯的11月竞选中晋级。这场对决是两位民主党人和前盟友之间竞争领导美国第二大城市的较量。
